stemHtml: For non-augmented GNSS operations, why must the availability of the GNSS service be checked before use?

options.a: Non-augmented GNSS operations must be registered with the service provider in advance.
options.b: The GNSS receiver must be programmed with the availability check.
options.c: There is NO indication on the flight deck in the case of the loss of a required satellite signal.
options.d: Only specific satellites produce the required signals for non-augmented operations.
